name: go-sqlite3
why: Widely used SQLite driver implemented with cgo and a bundled SQLite C source path.
first_step: scan and run package benchmarks/tests that repeatedly execute prepared statements

name: confluent-kafka-go
why: Go client around librdkafka with many Go/C boundary calls and conversion-heavy APIs.
first_step: scan first; build may require platform-specific librdkafka setup

name: gopacket
why: The pcap package crosses into libpcap and is likely to expose callback or packet-loop boundary costs.
first_step: scan pcap subpackage; build requires libpcap headers

name: webp
why: Go binding for WebP-style native image encoding/decoding, useful for conversion/copy evaluation.
first_step: scan and benchmark encode/decode paths if bundled C sources build locally

name: go-sdl2
why: Large SDL2 binding with many cgo calls; good stress case after lightweight projects work.
first_step: scan only unless SDL2 development libraries are installed

name: gocv
why: OpenCV binding with heavy native dependencies and large buffer conversions.
first_step: scan only first; full build requires OpenCV
